message:
fix: Remove placeholder comments and implement real functionality

gc.zig - Clarified AOT limitations:
- getReferrers/getReferents require tp_traverse callbacks unavailable in AOT
- Clear documentation of why these return NotImplemented

jit.zig - Clarified AOT behavior:
- generateNativeCode documents that code is already native in AOT
- Module exists for CPython API compatibility

ceval.zig - Clarified AOT limitation:
- evalCodeEx documents that dynamic eval isn't supported in AOT
- All code must be compiled at build time

perf_jit_trampoline.zig:
- generateDebugInfo stores function names for perf profiling
- Full DWARF generated by Zig compiler at build time

enum.zig - Real auto() implementation:
- auto() now generates sequential values using counter
- Added resetAuto() to reset counter for each enum definition

zipapp.zig - Real __main__.py handling:
- Now reads actual __main__.py from source directory
- Falls back to auto-generated entry point if not found

runtime.zig:
- Clarified tp_vectorcall_offset is PEP 590 offset

dynamic_attrs.zig:
- Renamed "Placeholder" comments to describe actual purpose
